# Google Docs Packet Workflow

This page mocks up a controlled Google Docs workflow for student writing. Instead of asking students to create a new copy for every prompt, the parent creates one response packet per student per book. The EPUB and HTML book then link each student to the correct packet.

## Parent Setup

1. Create a master packet template in Google Docs.
2. Make one copy for each student and book.
3. Name each copy with this pattern:

`Student Name - Book Title - Response Packet`

4. Place the copies in student folders, such as `Classical Language Arts / Emma` and `Classical Language Arts / James`.
5. Share each packet with the correct student.
6. Paste each packet's `/edit` link into the Student Dashboard and the matching unit page.

## Example Packet Links

These are placeholders for the real documents:

| Student | Book | Packet Link |
|---|---|---|
| Emma | The Secret Garden | <https://docs.google.com/document/d/EMMA_SECRET_GARDEN_GOOGLE_DOC_ID/edit> |
| James | The Secret Garden | <https://docs.google.com/document/d/JAMES_SECRET_GARDEN_GOOGLE_DOC_ID/edit> |

## Student Workflow

1. Open the literature unit.
2. Choose a writing prompt or project.
3. Select the student's own packet link.
4. Write under the correct assignment heading.
5. Mark the assignment as ready for review at the top of the packet.

## Unit Page Link Pattern

For a real curriculum page, a prompt section might include links like this:

::: {.discussion-box}
**Open your response packet**

- [Emma - The Secret Garden](https://docs.google.com/document/d/EMMA_SECRET_GARDEN_GOOGLE_DOC_ID/edit)
- [James - The Secret Garden](https://docs.google.com/document/d/JAMES_SECRET_GARDEN_GOOGLE_DOC_ID/edit)
:::

## Optional Family Drive Structure

```text
Classical Language Arts
  Templates
    Master Book Response Packet
    Project Report Insert
  Emma
    Aesop
    The Secret Garden
    Treasure Island
  James
    Aesop
    The Secret Garden
    Treasure Island
  Parent Review
    Ready for Review
    Reviewed
```

## Setup Checklist

```text
For each book:
  1. Copy the master packet for Emma.
  2. Copy the master packet for James.
  3. Rename both documents.
  4. Share each document with the correct student.
  5. Replace the placeholder links in this Quarto book.
  6. Render the HTML and EPUB versions again.
```

## Parent Review Pattern

Use Google Docs comments for corrections and questions. Keep a short parent review box near the top of the document so each response packet becomes a portfolio artifact.

```text
Parent Review
Latest assignment reviewed:
Strength:
Correction to practice:
Next step:
```
      Aesop
      The Secret Garden
      Treasure Island
    Child 2
      Aesop
      The Secret Garden
      Treasure Island
```

## Parent Review Pattern

Use Google Docs comments for corrections and questions. Keep the final grade or parent notes at the top of the document so each response becomes an easy portfolio artifact.
